summary: Frontend-only regression + full-section test of Advance Connect homepage Part 2. Verified 11 new sections load, all data-testids present, animations trigger on scroll, interactions work (FAQ accordion, testimonial dot/next nav, nav-link smooth scroll), lead form submission still succeeds end-to-end. No JS errors, no horizontal overflow at 1920/768/390.
critical_code_review_comments: Nav links use Lenis smooth scroll and correctly scroll targets to top, but location.hash is not updated after navigation (minor UX / deep-linking gap — consider history.pushState in Navbar click handler).
Three.js Clock deprecation warning in Hero3D console — non-blocking but should migrate to THREE.Timer to stay current.
WebGL 'ReadPixels' performance warnings from Hero3D — worth profiling if perf becomes an issue on low-end devices.
seed_data_creation: None — one lead form submission with TEST_ prefix data via public API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage sections all verified with data-testid. Marketplace select in LeadForm is a NATIVE <select> — use page.select_option(..., index=N) or by value ('Amazon','Flipkart','Meesho','Multiple'), NOT shadcn role='option' pattern. Nav links do not update location.hash — assert scroll position or target rect.top instead. Lenis smooth scroll needs ~1.5–2s wait after clicking. Page height ~13.5k px; scroll gradually to trigger GSAP ScrollTrigger reveals.
verified_testids: trusted-by-marquee, about-section, about-milestone-0..4, why-card-01/08, expertise-card-amazon/flipkart/meesho, service-card-0/11, laptop-mockup, dashboard-mockup, dash-stat-revenue/orders/inventory/account-health, dashboard-disclaimer, workflow-step-1/6, case-study-card-0/2, testimonial-prev/next, testimonial-dot-0..2, faq-trigger-0/5, faq-content-0/2, lead-input-name/phone/email/business, lead-select-marketplace, lead-form-submit-button, lead-form-success
